name: Easy Peanut Butter Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk (14-ounce, not evaporated)
recipeInstructions:
Makes about 2 pounds
1. In a large saucepan, melt peanut butter chips, 1 cup sweetened condensed milk, and 2 tablespoons butter; stir occasionally.
2. Remove from heat; stir in chopped peanuts.
3. Spread mixture into waxed paper-lined 8-inch square pan.
4. In a small saucepan, melt chocolate morsels, remaining sweetened condensed milk, and butter.
5. Spread chocolate mixture on top of peanut butter mixture.
6. Chill two hours or until firm.
7. Turn fudge onto cutting board; peel off paper and cut into squares.
8. Tightly cover any leftovers.
